text: The trigger eval set includes both positive and near-miss negative prompts.
evidence_required: Trigger eval JSON contains should_trigger true and false examples with adjacent domains.

text: The output reports trigger precision and recall or an explicit plan to compute them.
evidence_required: Report includes precision/recall fields or commands to compute them.

text: Held-out results are separated from training results.
evidence_required: Report or files distinguish train and held-out/test eval sets.
